title: SkillReviewConfig
description: JSON Schema for the reviewer plugin configuration file (config.json).

validation_weight.description: Weight of the validation component in the overall score (0–1). Default: 0.2.

judges.description: Per-judge weight map keyed by rubric filename stem. Each key must match a rubric file in rubrics/. The judge weights plus validation_weight must sum to 1.0 (validated at publish time, not enforced by this schema).
